title: Error Handling in Hybrid Quantum-Classical Systems
description: Master comprehensive error handling strategies for hybrid quantum-classical applications. Learn to handle quantum job failures, implement retry mechanisms, design graceful degradation patterns, and build robust fallback systems.
learningObjectives: Identify and categorize common quantum job failure modes
Implement robust retry strategies with exponential backoff
Design graceful degradation patterns for hybrid systems
Build classical fallback mechanisms when quantum resources fail
Apply exception handling patterns specific to quantum computing
